plan.regime: strong (SPY above MA50 and MA200, no high-vol breakdown)

reflection: Session was a disciplined no-action day. Regime is strong and the scan produced 11 Super tier candidates, but I am already at max 5 concurrent positions (APH, FIX, KLAC, LITE, TER). None of the current positions have broken thesis — all are green or within 0.5% of entry, none near stop. The temptation is to rotate out of a flat name (FIX, KLAC) into a hotter Super setup, but that would be activity-for-activity's sake. FIX and KLAC are consolidating tightly near 52w highs, which is a constructive pattern — don't abandon constructive bases. Holding position cap is the right call. Evidence-backed rules (low_volume_warning, far_from_high, weak_3m_momentum) didn't trigger any change today since I'm not entering. Macro note: VIX ticked up +2.85% to 19.46 — worth watching tomorrow but not a regime-change signal on its own. No new rule needed.
